    "Column is out of plumb exceeding the allowable AISC 303 envelope tolerance of 1/500 of the height."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen anchor bolts and bracing connections to adjust column plumbness.",
    "Re-measure plumbness using a transit or laser level to ensure it falls within AISC 303 limits before final torqueing."
  ],
  "rationale": "The column erection is roughed in but exceeds the standard AISC 303 plumbness tolerance (typically 1:500 or 1 inch per 500 inches of height), posing structural alignment and load path risks if not corrected before final closeout.",

    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R (Steel Erection)"
  ]
